changes: Mobile play mode controls (iPad/touch): dual analog sticks for movement and sword attack, grab hold button, noclip toggle button
Pinch-to-zoom with snap-to-factor and zoom-to-point for both main canvas and tileset
Touch selection and drag on tileset canvas with proper finger tracking
Double-tap detection for touch-based actions
Safari/iPad layout fixes (flex-basis, splitter height)
Application icon updated
Mobile play mode controls: left stick (movement), right stick (attack in all 4 directions), GRAB hold button, NOCLIP toggle button
Pinch-to-zoom snaps to clean zoom factors to prevent sub-pixel rendering artifacts
Zoom-to-point keeps the content under your fingers stable during pinch
Tileset canvas supports touch selection, drag, and pinch zoom
Auto-centers level view when canvas resizes and level is offscreen
Safari/iPad fixes: bottom gap resolved, splitter adapts to viewport correctly
Layer thumbnails improved: better scaling, centered, subtle border
Color scheme and custom CSS now shared globally between both editors
Skin recoloring now matches actual body sprite pixels (palette RGB corrected)
Player settings skin color defaults to blank (—) instead of brown
Canvas controls W/H inputs now show active tile selection dimensions, blank when none; up/down spinners resize selection
Auto-update no longer force-installs on launch — prompts with Update Now / Later dialog
"Skip this version" checkbox remembers dismissed updates per version
Tile Objects — Export button downloads all user-created groups as a JSON file
Tile Objects — Import button merges groups from a JSON file into the current library
Theme menu — Custom CSS option added (import, export, apply, clear) with Monaco editor and live injection
Custom CSS persisted to localStorage and restored on startup
Setshape2/setimgpart Editor — dialog title renamed to Setshape2/setimgpart Editor
Setshape2/setimgpart Editor — Cut button renamed to Setimgpart
Setshape2/setimgpart Editor — output areas now use syntax-highlighted pre elements (keywords, numbers, strings colored)
Setshape2/setimgpart Editor — Ctrl+Z/Y undo/redo (50-step history) for tile paint, clear, and import operations
About dialog — draggable by titlebar
example-theme.css — covers both editors; level editor classes, Setshape2, and Gmap Generator dialogs now themeable
Setshape2 and Gmap Generator dialogs — dialog-content and dialog-titlebar classes added for custom CSS targeting
Layer save fix — higher layers now only write BOARD lines for non-empty tile runs, matching TilesEditor format
objects/index.json now fetched instead of directory listing, works correctly in web/nginx deployments
Auto-updater — checks for updates on launch, downloads and installs silently, restarts automatically
Check for Updates button added to both editor toolbars (Tauri only)
Default objects loaded on startup
Color scheme skins titlebar, layer panel, tileset scrollbar, zoom sliders, Setshape2, Gmap Generator, Monaco autocomplete, and active tool buttons
About dialog shared across both editors with working changelog tab and credits
Update dialog and about menu background fixes
Tileset zoom slider skinned by color schemes
Global custom scrollbar styling
Layers panel — new Layers tab in right panel with thumbnail preview of each layer's tiles
Layers panel — Add/Delete buttons to dynamically create or remove layers (max 8)
Layers panel — click a layer row to switch active layer; visibility checkbox per layer
Layers panel — Up/Down arrow buttons and drag-to-reorder for changing layer draw order
Layers panel — active layer highlighted in blue; layer spinbox max updates dynamically
Tauri: native file dialogs, workspace indexing, lazy image loading from disk (no RAM preload)
Tauri: FILENAMECACHE.txt — workspace file index persisted to disk (classic Graal format: relative/path,crc32), no rescan on restart
Tauri: workspace scan streams results progressively via event-based chunks, UI stays responsive during indexing
PeerJS P2P collaboration — real-time multi-user editing with cursor sync, sprite changes, and frame updates
Play mode — walk around the level with WASD/arrow keys, full tile collision, camera follow, Shift to toggle noclip
Play mode — NPC collision using full image bounds; setshape(1,w,h) and setshape2(tw,th,{array}) override via NPC script
Play mode — link warping between levels with enter-edge detection to prevent looping
Play mode — link helper: walk to a position and press Spacebar to pin link destination using player collision center
Play mode — link helper shows rubber-band tile selection and confirm dialog (Accept/Retry/Cancel) with editable fields
Play mode — GS1 script parsing: setcharani, this.ani, this.head/body/shield, setcharprop (#1/#2/#3/#8/#m/#c/#n/#g/C0-C4/P0+), this.colors[], this.nick
Play mode — NPC nickname and guild displayed above character
Play mode — sitting tile detection using player collision center
Play mode — debug overlay (key 2) shows NPC hitboxes, link bounds, player collision box, sitting tile highlights
Play mode — edit bypass toggle (key 3) to double-click and edit objects without exiting play mode
Player settings dialog — customize HEAD, BODY, SHIELD, SWORD, HAT, colors, and per-action ganis
Player settings dialog — animated preview canvas with pan/drag, scroll-wheel zoom, +/- buttons, 4-direction d-pad, double-click to recenter
NW parser fix — level names with spaces (e.g. 'new 2.nw') no longer corrupt link x/y/width fields; binary graal link parser patched to match
Link serialization — empty nextLevel writes as '-' placeholder to keep token count valid on reload
Encrypted or binary .gani files are now rejected with an error on direct load (file picker, drag & drop, reload) — silently ignored when browsing from workspace
Right-clicking a tab shows a context menu — Rename, Close, Close to the Left, Close to the Right (bulk close prompts confirmation)
Sprite selection now uses pixel-accurate hit testing — clicking no longer selects sprites whose bounding box overlaps the cursor but whose actual pixels do not
Workspace browser: clicking a gani now opens it in a new tab instead of importing sprites
Workspace browser: search now uses fuzzy matching — type characters in order, no need for exact match
Open Default dialog no longer shows workspace ganis — only uses the built-in ganis/ list
Tab bar now has scroll buttons when many tabs are open instead of growing taller
Added workspace browser for browsing gani and sound files from the current workspace directory
Workspace loading now loads images in parallel batches — large workspaces load significantly faster
Drag and drop a .gani file anywhere onto the page to open it in a new tab — supports dropping multiple files at once
.graal and .zelda binary format support — open, view, and save classic Graal/Zelda Online levels
Zelda format enforces object restrictions — NPC and Chest placement blocked for .zelda tabs
Binary tile RLE decoder with LSB-first bitstream (12-bit V0/V1, 13-bit V2/V3)
Sign text decoded/encoded using classic Graal character table and control code sequences
Tileset switching now works for all images in fileCache (not just file-picker uploads)
Tileset persists when switching tabs — levels with default tileset inherit the combo selection
Tab bar scrolls horizontally instead of wrapping to multiple rows
pics1.gif added to default tileset combo list
Fixed canvas blanking out after uploading a gani — canvas now resizes correctly on tab switch
Fixed _sx is not defined crash when drawing sprites without loaded images
Center View no longer resets zoom — only centers pan to grid origin
Zoom buttons and keyboard zoom no longer drift the view — pan is now properly adjusted to keep center anchored
Fixed drag origin indicator — was incorrectly showing after drop instead of during drag
Right-clicking or pressing Escape while dragging a sprite cancels the drag and snaps it back to its origin
Drag origin line and dot scaled up for high-resolution displays
Right-clicking a sprite or on the canvas shows a context menu — Edit Sprite, Copy/Cut/Delete, Paste, Add, Center View
Pixel grid toggle button added to canvas controls
Keybinds moved to Settings dialog (Settings | Canvas | Keybinds tabs) — F1 opens About, F2 opens Settings
System fonts loaded via queryLocalFonts() where available
Drag selection box selects and deselects sprites live as you drag
About/Info dialog is now a fixed height — switching to Changelog no longer resizes the window
Monaco editor (VS Code engine) used for Edit Script and Custom CSS dialogs — Graal script syntax highlighting
GScript autocomplete and hover docs in Edit Script — powered by api.gscript.dev
Custom CSS variables --canvas-bg, --canvas-grid, --timeline-bg, --preview-bg, --monaco-theme and more for full theming
All custom dialogs (Confirm, Alert, Settings, Edit Script, Custom CSS) now have titled headers
Multi-frame timeline selection — Shift/Ctrl+click frames then drag to move as a group
Ctrl+C/X/V to copy/cut/paste selected canvas pieces
Fixed Lights mode (EFFECTMODE 0) creating visual duplication
NPC showcharacter renders idle.gani character in the level
setcharani support — GS1 and GS2 both parsed
this.head/body/shield overrides gani defaults if file is in working dir cache
this.colors[0-4] recolors BODY sprites using Graal palette
Screenshot excludes NPC placeholders, selection highlight, signs, and links
Working dir scan batched (64 parallel) with UI yield between batches
Color scheme palette button added to toolbar
GS1/GS2 syntax checker in NPC editor — flags unclosed strings, mismatched braces/parens/brackets
Layer visibility toggles — show/hide Layer 1, 2, 3 independently
Tile selection copy/paste: right-click to clone as stamp, Ctrl+C/V
NPC click priority over links
Fixed link resize handles misfiring at low zoom levels
Save level now uses the tab name as the filename
Save As prompts to rename and downloads with the new name
Right-click a tab to rename, save as, or close it
GMAP save dialog — Save All or Save Changed, downloads a ZIP
Tile Objects now includes all 5 groups: Standard, Castle, House Inside, Snow, Volcano
Undo/redo now covers NPC, link, sign, and chest add/delete
Double-clicking an NPC in the NPC list opens its script editor
Link resize anchors fixed — hit detection now matches rendered handle positions exactly
Edit Links and Edit Signs now open popup dialogs matching C++ TilesEditor
Add Link and Add Sign buttons use the active tile selection for position and size
Add Link and Add Sign icons updated — composite SVGs
Unified info menu combining About, Keybinds, and Changelog into one tabbed dialog (F1)
Timeline zoom via Ctrl+Scroll (desktop) and pinch-to-zoom (mobile)
Custom CSS support via theme menu — import, export, and live-apply your own stylesheet
Multi-frame timeline selection — Shift/Ctrl+click frames then drag to move as a group
All keybinds now rebindable in the Keybinds tab
Ctrl+A select all sprites, [ / ] layer down/up, Shift+Tab adds next sprite to selection
Styled tooltips on all toolbar and playback buttons
Tile stamp now places on click — no longer requires dragging to paint
Load Tileset button adds the loaded file to the tileset combo list and selects it
Clicking and dragging an NPC/object now works on first click without prior selection
Initial release — object selection, drag-to-place, right-click cancel, mousewheel zoom
Working dir chest/baddy/npc images shown in level
Multi-tab session persistence — all open tabs restored on page reload
Monaco NPC script editor with GraalScript LSP
Flip H/V and rotate tile selection
About dialog with changelog tab
